lanes.goal: Add Mission Control coverage, adoption, and evidence completeness projections.
lanes.expected_output: projection fields in Mission Control payload

lanes.goal: Add narrow projection audit and release-state integration.
lanes.expected_output: mission-control-projection-audit and v7.8 release gate integration

join_packet.conflict_summary: No conflict; projection and audit lanes reinforce the same source-of-truth boundary.
join_packet.blocker_summary: No active blocker after projection compatibility fixes.
join_packet.merge_rationale: Both lanes are required for release-grade projection: visible fields plus enforceable audit.
join_packet.council_authority: Operations Council approves release readiness after verification gates pass.

not_proven: Parallel lane pilot proves bounded lane evidence and join decision, not speed improvement or semantic correctness.
